# metes

> AI-powered listing marketing for high-performing solo real estate agents.

metes (https://www.metes.app) is a per-listing marketing engine that generates a complete campaign from listing photos and agent notes. Agents upload photos and notes, review AI-extracted property details, then receive a full marketing package — all before paying.

## What metes produces

- MLS-ready listing description (lifestyle-forward, not utility-forward)
- Social launch pack — Facebook and Instagram captions paired to specific listing photos
- 4-email campaign sequence — Just Listed, Open House, Why This Home, Just Sold
- Fair Housing compliance audit on every asset before publishing
- Top 25 photos ranked by marketing impact and renamed with SEO-friendly filenames
- Optional: professional photo editing — sky replacement, color correction, perspective fix

## How it works

1. Agent uploads listing photos (up to 50) and pastes agent notes
2. metes analyzes photos using computer vision to detect room types, features, and quality
3. Agent reviews and corrects extracted property details
4. metes generates the full marketing campaign in ~30 seconds
5. Agent previews everything before paying $35
6. Download ZIP contains all assets ready for MLS upload and distribution

## Pricing

- Listing Copy Package: $35 per listing (no subscription)
- Photo Editing Add-on: +$45 (color correction, sky replacement, perspective fix)
- No account required. No card on file until after preview.

## Free tools

- Fair Housing Compliance Checker (https://www.metes.app/tools/compliance-check) — paste any listing description for a free Fair Housing audit
- Neighborhood Guide Generator (https://www.metes.app/tools/neighborhood-guide) — enter any address to generate a neighborhood guide for agents and buyers

## Technology

metes uses Google Gemini Flash for vision analysis and copy generation, Autoenhance.ai for photo editing, and Cloudflare R2 for asset storage. Built on FastAPI (Python) and Next.js.

## Target user

High-performing solo real estate agents in the United States who list residential properties and want to move faster without sacrificing marketing quality.

## Company

metes is an independent micro-SaaS product. Contact: assets@metes.app
